name: sketchycut
description: Deterministic flat-pack fabrication kernel for SketchyCut.

scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:app
scripts.evaluate:m5:sol: node --import tsx tools/m5-sidecar.ts --mode live --model gpt-5.6-sol --evaluate-once m5-rigid-structure-and-bilateral-motif
scripts.evaluate:m5:sol:revision-2: node --import tsx tools/m5-sidecar.ts --mode live --model gpt-5.6-sol --evaluate-once m5-rigid-structure-and-bilateral-motif --evaluation-attempt 2
scripts.evaluate:m5:sol:revision-3: node --import tsx tools/m5-sidecar.ts --mode live --model gpt-5.6-sol --evaluate-once m5-rigid-structure-and-bilateral-motif --evaluation-attempt 3 --retry-recording-incident incident-sol-revision-2-ledger-validation
scripts.evaluate:m5:terra: node --import tsx tools/m5-sidecar.ts --mode live --model gpt-5.6-terra --evaluate-once m5-rigid-structure-and-bilateral-motif
scripts.evaluate:m5:terra:canary-1: node --import tsx tools/m5-sidecar.ts --mode live --model gpt-5.6-terra --evaluate-once m5-rigid-structure-and-bilateral-motif --integration-canary-after incident-sol-revision-2-ledger-validation
scripts.evaluate:m5:terra:revision-2: node --import tsx tools/m5-sidecar.ts --mode live --model gpt-5.6-terra --evaluate-once m5-rigid-structure-and-bilateral-motif --evaluation-attempt 2 --integration-canary-after incident-sol-revision-2-ledger-validation
scripts.evaluate:m5:terra:revision-3: node --import tsx tools/m5-sidecar.ts --mode live --model gpt-5.6-terra --evaluate-once m5-rigid-structure-and-bilateral-motif --evaluation-attempt 3 --integration-canary-after incident-sol-revision-2-ledger-validation
scripts.generate:m2.1: node --import tsx tools/run-m21-input-sweep.ts && node --import tsx tools/generate-m21-artifacts.ts
scripts.generate:m3.1.1: node --import tsx tools/generate-m311-studio-probes.ts && node --import tsx tools/generate-m311-artifacts.ts
scripts.generate:golden: node --import tsx tools/update-m1-golden.ts && node --import tsx tools/update-m2-golden.ts && node --import tsx tools/update-m3-golden.ts && node --import tsx tools/update-m31-golden.ts && node --import tsx tools/update-m4-golden.ts
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run verify:architecture && npm run test && npm run build && npm run verify:m5-production && npm run verify:m5-live-config && npm run verify:m5-privacy && npm run verify:m5-dependencies && npm run validate:json && npm run verify:artifact-gates && npm run verify:m5-evidence
scripts.verify:artifact-gates: npm run verify:artifacts && npm run verify:m2-artifacts && npm run verify:m2.1-artifacts && npm run verify:m3-artifacts && npm run verify:m3.1-artifacts && npm run verify:m3.1.1-artifacts && npm run verify:m3.2-artifacts && npm run verify:m4-artifacts && npm run verify:m5-artifacts
